nodes.label: Pure-code durable research hypothesis registry (P3-b).  The registry is intentio
Validate that a status transition is legal.      Raises:         ValueError: If
Return the configured hypotheses JSON path.      Returns:         Env override p
A research hypothesis tracked across analysis and backtests.      Attributes:
Serialize the hypothesis to plain JSON-compatible data.
Build a hypothesis from persisted JSON data.
File-backed registry for research hypotheses.      P3-E: Optionally backed by SQ
Initialize the registry.          Args:             path: Optional JSON storage
Create and persist a new hypothesis.
Update an existing hypothesis.          P3-C: status changes are validated again
Link a run card or backtest artifact to a hypothesis.
Create a child hypothesis derived from a parent.          Inherits parent's univ
Mark two hypotheses as contradicting (one-way from hyp_id's perspective).
Associate a hypothesis with a research goal.
Return all hypotheses linked to a given goal.
Return all child hypotheses of a parent.
Return all hypotheses that this one contradicts.
Search hypotheses by text and/or status.          Args:             query: Text
Return a hypothesis by id or None if missing.
